title: العدول يرفضون ربط مطالب المهنة بـ”فتوى”
summary: أثارت تصريحات وزير العدل الأخيرة جدلا واسعا في أوساط مهنيي التوثيق العدلي، إذ استنكرت الجمعية المغربية للعدول، في بلاغ لها، “ربط الوزير رفض عدد من مطالب العدول بـ”فتوى” منسوبة إلى المجلس العلمي الأعلى”، معتبرة هذا تطورا خطيرا في النقاش العمومي حول إصلاح منظومة العدالة، ومحاولة لإضفاء طابعأكمل القرا…
body: أثارت تصريحات وزير العدل الأخيرة جدلا واسعا في أوساط مهنيي التوثيق العدلي، إذ استنكرت الجمعية المغربية للعدول، في بلاغ لها، “ربط الوزير رفض عدد من مطالب العدول بـ”فتوى” منسوبة إلى المجلس العلمي الأعلى”، معتبرة هذا تطورا خطيرا في النقاش العمومي حول إصلاح منظومة العدالة، ومحاولة لإضفاء طابع أكمل القراءة » المقالة العدول يرفضون ربط مطالب المهنة بـ”فتوى” fمنشورة على جريدة الصباح .

title: The ‘Lonely Runner’ Problem Only Appears Simple
summary: Take a group of runners circling a track at unique, constant paces. Answering the question of how many will always end up running alone, no matter their speed, has vexed mathematicians for decades.

title: Archaeologists discover perfectly circular ancient Egyptian temple that may have been used for sacred water rituals
summary: The temple included a network of water infrastructure, revealing the importance of the ancient city and the Nile.

title: Some polar bears are adapting to their melting habitat. Will it be enough to save the iconic species?
summary: Bears in Svalbard, Norway, are fatter than expected, and others in Greenland are showing signs of genetically adapting to climate change — but the signs elsewhere are not good.

title: How Can Astronauts Tell How Fast They’re Going?
summary: Weirdly, spaceships have no direct way to gauge their own speed. Luckily, we can use some physics tricks to figure it out.

title: 20% Squarespace Promo Codes | April 2026
summary: Get 20% off your next website, 10% off with exclusive Squarespace discount code, 50% off plans, and more top coupons from WIRED.

title: 2 supermassive black holes may collide 100 years from now ‪—‬ and Earth would feel it
summary: In a galaxy 500 million light-years away, two supermassive black holes could merge, spreading gravitational waves across the universe.

title: Anglo-Saxon burial holds an older sister cradling her little brother after they both died 1,400 years ago, possibly of an infectious disease
summary: An ancient-DNA analysis of a rare Anglo-Saxon double burial revealed the people in the grave were brother and sister.

title: Dark Matter May Be Made of Black Holes From Another Universe
summary: A model of the cyclic universe suggests that dark matter could be a population of black holes predating the Big Bang.

title: Colorado River may have pooled and spilled over to form the Grand Canyon, solving a long-standing mystery ‪—‬ but not everyone agrees
summary: The Colorado River muscled its way through today's Grand Canyon after pooling as a giant lake, according to new research.

title: The first black hole ever discovered is spewing 'dancing jets' at half the speed of light
summary: Astronomers have accurately measured the "dancing" energy jets of the first confirmed black hole, Cygnus X-1, more than 60 years after it was first spotted.

title: Stephen Hawking's black hole information paradox could be solved — if the universe has 7 dimensions
summary: Stephen Hawking's theory of black hole evaporation clashes with the laws of quantum mechanics. A new paper finds a way around this paradox, provided that the universe has seven dimensions.

title: Artemis II quiz: Is your knowledge of NASA's historic moon mission out of this world?
summary: The slingshot around the moon has catapulted the Artemis II mission to legendary status. How much do you know about this iconic mission?

title: Ancient process that created rare earth elements discovered — and it could help us locate desperately needed deposits
summary: A new study suggests rare earth elements form in magma above ancient subduction zones, as that magma reacts with substances that are released when one tectonic plate dives beneath another.

title: 73 moon landings? NASA's 'Moon Base User's Guide' reveals the agency's 'most ambitious space project' will be fraught with challenges
summary: NASA has released a 'Moon Base User's Guide' that reveals the major gaps the agency and its partners must fill in to land and live on the moon.

title: Triassic croc relative from Ghost Ranch, New Mexico finally identified after nearly 80 years in museum basement
summary: During the Triassic, a newly described species related to modern crocodiles and alligators stalked prey on land, not the water, a new study finds.

title: There were 'audible screams of delight': Why Artemis II sightings of meteor flashes on the moon have scientists giddy
summary: Meteorite strikes spotted on the moon by the Artemis II crew will help scientists assess dangers to future moon bases, infrastructure, and astronauts.

title: Physicists just witnessed pinpricks of darkness moving faster than the speed of light ‪—‬ without breaking the laws of relativity
summary: For the first time, researchers measured singularities in combined light and sound waves moving faster than the speed of light. The findings have implications in fluid dynamics, optics and many other fields.

title: Homo erectus' tools include stunning geodes and fossils, possibly as a way to connect with the cosmos, study finds
summary: Homo erectus may have deliberately selected rocks embedded with fossils and crystals to craft their hand axes — possibly to serve as mediators between humans and the cosmos.

title: 'Really, really weird': Physicists entangle two moving atoms for the first time, validating 'spooky' quantum theory
summary: For the first time, scientists have observed quantum entanglement in the momentum of massive particles. The result, decades in the making, could help physicists probe the relationship between quantum mechanics and gravity.

title: 'I have not processed what we just did': Artemis II astronauts share all in first news conference since splashdown
summary: The Artemis II crew have spoken publicly for the first time since their return to Earth.

title: Idol of Pomos: A 5,000-year-old fertility figurine from Cyprus that wears a miniature version of herself on a necklace
summary: The cross-shaped figurine has become a potent symbol of Cyprus' contribution to prehistory.

title: Ancient Egyptian stone monument depicting a Roman emperor as a pharaoh discovered in Luxor
summary: A stone slab depicting the Roman emperor Tiberius was found during restoration work at the Karnak temple complex in Luxor.

title: 'Human minds shouldn't have to go through' this: Artemis II crew recalls unreal moment when Earth disappeared — Space photo of the week
summary: A stunning Earthset image from Artemis II recalls Apollo 8's Earthrise, marking humanity's return to deep space and the start of a new era of exploration.

title: Does the moon look the same from everywhere on Earth?
summary: The moon's orientation changes quite dramatically across time and between places, largely due to differences in perspective.

title: 10 Artemis II photos that define humanity's return to the moon
summary: From spectacular views of Earth to a unique total solar eclipse, Artemis II's most breathtaking images tell the story of humanity's return to deep space after more than 50 years.

title: 'I'm at a loss for words': Artemis II mission comes home to joy and cheers after historic 10-day mission
summary: NASA's 10-day moon mission has officially ended with a "bullseye landing"

title: فيديو.. هبوط رواد "أرتيميس 2" في مياه المحيط الهادئ
summary: هبطت مركبة مهمة "أرتيميس 2" التي حملت 4 رواد فضاء حول القمر، الجمعة، في مياه المحيط الهادئ مقابل سواحل كاليفورنيا، كما هو مخطط لها.

title: There are 'reasons to be confident' about faulty Artemis II heat shield ahead of 25,000 mph reentry, space expert Ed Macaulay says
summary: NASA's Artemis II heat shield is about to face its ultimate test as the Orion crew prepares for reentry. Physics and data science lecturer Ed Macaulay tells Live Science reasons to be confident ahead of today's historic splashdown.

title: The moon is green and brown? Why scientists are already excited about Artemis II's historic lunar photos
summary: As Earth reels at the beauty of Artemis II's historic lunar flyby photos, geologists working on the mission are excited for big insights about the moon.

title: على شكل "كرة نار".. رواد الفضاء يستعدون للعودة إلى الأرض
summary: يستعد رواد الفضاء الذين أرسلتهم وكالة الفضاء الأميركية "ناسا" إلى القمر في إطار مهمة "أرتيمس 2" للعودة إلى الأرض، وذلك بعد انطلاقهم في مطلع أبريل الجاري.

title: 10 ملايين دولار.. مكافأة أميركية لاعتقال شقيقين يقودان عصابة
summary: قالت وزارة الخارجية الأميركية يوم الخميس إنها ستدفع ما يصل إلى 10 ملايين دولار مقابل معلومات تؤدي إلى اعتقال أو إدانة شقيقين تم تحديدهما كزعيمين لعصابة سينالوا المكسيكية في ولاية باها كاليفورنيا، التي تضم مدينة تيخوانا.
